description: This image is a false-colour infrared satellite photograph of the Siliceous Pyrenean Festuca eskia grassland, located within the Tendeñera Natura 2000 (N2K) site in the Pyrenees. The image was acquired by the SPOT-5 satellite with a 2.5 m resolution using a 1/2/3 Band Combination, which renders healthy vegetation in shades of reddish-purple. Key features include a bright green circular point located near the top-centre, and an irregular light green line delineating a boundary across the lower part of the image, likely the Natura 2000 site boundary. Patches of lighter blue/white are visible towards the top, possibly indicating snow or bare rock. Darker linear features suggest valleys, shadows, or water bodies across the mountainous terrain.
